action: Open Google Chrome browser on the computer and navigate to 'https://www.youtube.com'.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task is to open Google Chrome and navigate to 'https://www.youtube.com'. On the current screen, I can see the Google Chrome web browser icon (Box ID 161). The first step is to open Google Chrome by clicking on its icon.

previous action: I was instructed to open Google Chrome by clicking its icon. Looking at the current screen, I can see that Google Chrome is now open. The browser window is visible, and the address bar is present at the top. The next step is to navigate to 'https://www.youtube.com'. To do this, I will click on the address bar to focus it before typing the URL.

previous action: I was instructed to click on the address bar in Google Chrome. The current screenshot shows that the address bar is now focused, as indicated by the blue highlight and the blinking cursor in the address bar area. This means the previous action succeeded. The next step is to type 'https://www.youtube.com' into the address bar to navigate to YouTube.

previous action: I was instructed to type 'https://www.youtube.com' into the address bar. The current screenshot shows the URL 'https://www.youtube.com' is now present in the address bar, but the browser has not yet navigated to the site. To complete the navigation, I need to press 'Enter' so that Chrome loads the YouTube website.
